profile.education: Studying towards a Bachelors in Film Studies
profile.style:
Writing style: Your writing style on Reddit is casual and reflects your young, urban, and creative background. You tend to use lowercase letters to start sentences, and you're not overly concerned with perfect punctuation, which gives your comments a laid-back vibe. You often use slang and pop culture references that resonate with your generation. Emojis and internet acronyms are part of your lexicon, adding an expressive flair to your text. Despite the informal approach, your comments are coherent and show a good grasp of language, likely influenced by your film studies education. You're not afraid to show your personality or your passion for the arts and social issues, which often seep into your discussions.

Example: lol, so i was at this tiny coffee shop yesterday, and they had this indie film playing in the background? totally my vibe. anyone else here into obscure movies? 🎥✨ btw, if you're ever in LA, hit me up for some coffee shop recs!
